__info: ACF field values for the Home (Front Page). These are imported as post meta on the page designated as page_on_front. Field group definitions are auto-loaded from acf-json/ directory.
milo_services_quote: "The kind of collaborator you build a company around."
milo_services_quote_desc: Seven years of work across startups, labs, and agencies — shipped, documented, and loved.

milo_portfolio_items.title: Ledger
milo_portfolio_items.description: A calm revenue dashboard that collapses six SaaS tools into one interface.

milo_portfolio_items.title: Thread

milo_portfolio_items.title: Fieldnote

Twenty-something more case studies, from side projects to client work.

milo_testimonial_items.quote: Milo has the rare ability to hold both ends of a problem at once. They argue system architecture at lunch and push pixels by dinner. The kind of person you build a company around.
Hundreds of collaborators in my career. Milo sits firmly in the top five. Impeccable taste, structural thinking, and they actually ship the work.
I gave Milo a half-formed brief and an impossible deadline. They returned something better than I could have specified. Then made it faster.

milo_faq_items.question: How do you typically work with teams?
milo_faq_items.answer: I work as a one-person senior team — embedded for a stretch (usually six to twelve weeks), with a clear outcome agreed up front. Async by default, weekly sync, Friday demos. Nothing exotic.

milo_faq_items.question: What does an engagement cost?
milo_faq_items.answer: Pricing is per engagement rather than hourly — typically $18–45k depending on scope and shape. I try to quote tightly and won't take a project I don't think will succeed.

milo_faq_items.question: Do you work with designers, or only as a solo?
milo_faq_items.answer: Both. I've led small teams, embedded as a +1 in existing ones, and worked as the only designer-engineer in early-stage companies. Happy to flex into what you need.

milo_faq_items.question: What's your stack?
milo_faq_items.answer: React, TypeScript, and Tailwind for most product work. Figma for design. Framer Motion or GSAP for motion. Comfortable across the stack, and will pick up whatever the team is already using.

milo_faq_items.question: When can you start?
milo_faq_items.answer: Right now, I have capacity from Q3 2026. I usually book one project at a time so focus doesn't get split. Happy to run a short scoping session before any commitment.
